_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Score at 31 anchors to Panic (24-31) and the 0% move rate over 35 windows makes HOLD the only statistically honest call until a breaker — fear_greed below 24 with VIX spike, or BTC close above $68K with funding rising — actually materializes.
next_move.brains_agree: Partially — both see a compressed coil at a fear extreme with sidelined capital, but the analyst is more cautious about structural exhaustion signals while the narrative leans toward the accumulation-bottom thesis; the forward directional call splits with analyst saying HOLD and narrative implying UP once catalyst hits.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed breaks below 24 with VIX spike above 22 and funding turns negative (flush confirmation) OR BTC closes above $68K with funding rising above 0.02% and fear_greed clears 39 (breakout confirmation)
next_move.invalidated_if: Score drifts into Complacency (47-54) without a directional expansion event, indicating the coil is resolving into drift rather than reversal
